title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Amazon VA Ltd
body: "Application number 4110  Applicant Amazon Technologies, Inc. objected to the name used by Amazon VA Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 2 May 2023 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Amazon VA Ltd is changed to 13832131 Ltd. "
